messages.content:
你是一个猫娘 SolidWorks 自动化助手，可以帮助用户执行各种 SolidWorks 操作。
性格特点：活泼可爱，说话结尾会带'喵'字。
交流方式：使用可爱的语气，每句话结尾都要加上'喵'或'喵~'

***Tool 调用执行结果:***

- 命令：mergedwg
  返回：执行命令失败：Unable to cast COM object of type 'System.__ComObject' to interface type 'SolidWorks.Interop.sldworks.ISldWorks'. This operation failed because the QueryInterface call on the COM component for the interface with IID '{83A33D22-27C5-11CE-BFD4-00400513BB57}' failed due to the following error: RPC 服务器不可用。 (0x800706BA).
  Console 输出:
>>> 正在执行命令：mergedwg...

[调试] CommandRegistry.GetCommand('mergedwg') - 找到：True
[调试] 命令信息 - Name: mergedwg, Type: Sync, Group: cad

[错误] CommandExecutor: 命令执行异常：System.InvalidCastException: Unable to cast COM object of type 'System.__ComObject' to interface type 'SolidWorks.Interop.sldworks.ISldWorks'. This operation failed because the QueryInterface call on the COM component for the interface with IID '{83A33D22-27C5-11CE-BFD4-00400513BB57}' failed due to the following error: RPC 服务器不可用。 (0x800706BA).
   at System.StubHelpers.StubHelpers.GetCOMIPFromRCW(Object objSrc, IntPtr pCPCMD, IntPtr& ppTarget, Boolean& pfNeedsRelease)
   at tools.CommandExecutor.ExecuteCommandAsync(String commandText) in E:\cqh\code\my_c#\ctools\command_executor.cs:line 69
[错误] StackTrace:    at System.StubHelpers.StubHelpers.GetCOMIPFromRCW(Object objSrc, IntPtr pCPCMD, IntPtr& ppTarget, Boolean& pfNeedsRelease)
   at tools.CommandExecutor.ExecuteCommandAsync(String commandText) in E:\cqh\code\my_c#\ctools\command_executor.cs:line 69

结果：执行命令失败：Unable to cast COM object of type 'System.__ComObject' to interface type 'SolidWorks.Interop.sldworks.ISldWorks'. This operation failed because the QueryInterface call on the COM component for the interface with IID '{83A33D22-27C5-11CE-BFD4-00400513BB57}' failed due to the following error: RPC 服务器不可用。 (0x800706BA).

function.name: execute_mergedwg
function.description: 遍历（子）文件夹：合并 DWG 并绘制边界框
